description_long: This is a modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof and clean, geometric lines. The front features a covered porch area with a carport and a small landscaped garden bordered by low brick planters. Large, dark-framed windows are asymmetrically placed on the side, providing ample natural light to the interior. The rear of the bungalow is simple, with a large window and minimal ornamentation, while the side view reveals a grid-like window and additional garden space. The exterior is finished in smooth, light-colored plaster with some wooden and metal accents. The overall design emphasizes simplicity, functionality, and integration with outdoor spaces.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with a covered porch, carport, landscaped garden, and large asymmetrical windows.
description_view_0: Front view showing the covered porch, carport, main entrance, and landscaped garden with low brick planters.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the extended roof, grid-like window, and additional garden area.
description_view_2: Rear view with a large window and minimal detailing, emphasizing the flat roof and clean lines.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displaying large, dark-framed windows and the continuation of the garden and porch area.
